subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Best-Beloved Who, through His pure and consummate power, created the heavens of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که بقدرت کامله بحته خود خلق فرمود سموات بیان را
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
